basics.name: Yuma Uchida
basics.label: Infrastructure Engineer / Project Manager
basics.summary: Engineer who handles both PM and technical lead roles. Covers the full range from technology selection and infrastructure design for new applications, through backend implementation and team management.

work.name: OR Lab Inc.
work.summary: Development of a unified booking management and smart lock control tool for accommodations.
highlights: Infrastructure as Code with AWS CDK: Automated environment provisioning and ensured reproducibility, reducing deployment time by 50%.
E2E Testing with Playwright: Introduced automated regression testing from scratch, significantly reducing manual QA costs.
Tech Lead for a multi-national team (Japan, Philippines, Vietnam): Led code reviews, architectural decisions, and English-language communication across borders.

work.name: Company S (Medical)
work.summary: New development and operation of a CRM (Patient Management System) and LINE Mini App for medical institutions.
highlights: PM & Dev Lead for a 20-person team (Engineers, Designers, QA).
Introduced Playwright automated testing, cutting the release bug rate from 6% to 3% — a 50% reduction.
Stakeholder Management: Aligned interests across Sales, CS, and Engineering, defining roadmaps and priorities.

work.name: Company S (Franchise)
work.summary: Development and maintenance of a core business system (Inventory, Estimation, Ordering, Construction Management) for a franchise headquarters and its franchisees.
highlights: Digital Transformation: Centralized fragmented Excel/paper workflows into a unified system, improving operational efficiency by ~30%.
Cloud Migration: Designed and implemented migration from on-premise to AWS ECS Fargate; built a CI/CD pipeline (CodePipeline) to accelerate delivery.
Major Upgrade: Led migration from Laravel 6 to 10, refactoring legacy code and eliminating technical debt.

work.name: Canon Inc.
work.summary: Research and development of fuser materials for laser printers. Achieved a 10% reduction in text blur and degradation through material optimization. Transitioned to software engineering in September 2016.

awards.title: Impress Academy Lecturer
awards.summary: Docker / Kubernetes corporate workshops (60 attendees, 95%+ satisfaction)
